channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran begins multi-day funeral for late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
item.description: Iran started a dayslong funeral Saturday for the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, months after an airstrike killed him.

item.title: Cape Verde's historic World Cup run ends after close match with Argentina
item.description: Cape Verde did not win a match at the World Cup, but their debut on the global stage was unforgettable.

item.title: Swing voters express cautious optimism about America at 250
item.description: As the nation marks its 250th anniversary, swing voters share mixed feelings ranging from uncertainty to concern.

item.title: Thoughts on America's 250th anniversary
item.description: NPR reporters across the U.S. asked citizens to reflect on their country during its semiquincentennial.
